creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
Created attachment 162073
Update s6 version

Makefile: Version bump
Makefile: Dependency bump
distinfo: contents update
pkg-plist: shared library version bump

Notable changes between 2.2.0.1 and 2.2.2.0:
s6-svc supports new -wr and -wR options for blocking on restarts
s6-svlisten1 and s6-svlisten support new -r and -R options for blocking on service restarts

GNU Make version dependency reduced to 3.81
